creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Hello,

I've noticed that the current greybird-theme version in ports accumulates glitches with the latest batch of xfce updates (mostly regaring gtk3 stuff).

I'd like to propose an update that bring this port up to date.

Here's a bit of QA:

x11-themes/greybird-theme# portlint    
looks fine.

x11-themes/greybird-theme# make check-plist
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

Thanks for your time,
